nasb.text: Then Saul commanded his servants, “Speak to David secretly, saying, ‘Behold, the king delights in you, and all his servants love you; now therefore, become the king’s son-in-law.’ ”

esv.text: And Saul commanded his servants, “Speak to David in private and say, ‘Behold, the king has delight in you, and all his servants love you. Now then become the king’s son-in-law.’”

cnv.text: 掃羅吩咐他的臣僕：“你們要私下對大衛說：‘王喜歡你，他的臣僕也都愛你，現在你要作王的女婿！’”

ccb.text: 他又吩咐臣仆，说：“你们私底下告诉大卫，说王很欣赏他，群臣都爱戴他，劝他做王的女婿。”
